name: com.bidscube.applovin.max
description: Bidscube adapter for AppLovin MAX mediation. Supports Android LiteNoVideo, WebViewVideoNoDesugar, LegacyMediaVideoNoDesugar, and FullWithVideo build modes.

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK (requires com.bidscube.sdk and Unity UI packages in the host project).
